svg.title: F2 — K-12 CS Framework dependency graph that HCIE adapts over
svg.desc: Five core CS areas as swimlanes across four grade bands K-2, 3-5, 6-8, 9-12, with within-area prerequisite arrows and cross-area transfer arrows into the computational-thinking practice chain.
svg.text: F2 · K-12 CS Framework dependency graph the /learn flow adapts over
Areas as swimlanes, grade bands as columns. Solid = prerequisite progression · Dashed = cross-area transfer (real weights).

Aggregated big-picture view: 5 areas × 4 grade bands + 7-practice chain. Source: real_dag_dependencies.py (70 concept nodes, 55 weighted dependency edges; transfer weights 0.75–0.95). Showing all 4 cross-area transfer edges.
